task: I’m helping a family member shop for an affordable used Toyota and want a realistic comparison across a couple of car sites before we decide what to pursue. On Edmunds, please search around Augusta, Georgia and find the cheapest used Toyota RAV4 listing that has both AWD and heated seats, then open the actual vehicle listing so you can confirm those features on the page and note the price, year, mileage, dealer or seller, and anything else basic that stands out; leave that listing open in its own tab so I can look at the photos and details later. Then, using that RAV4 as the benchmark for what the market looks like, go to Cars.com and search for any used Toyota within 50 miles of Augusta, GA priced at $10,000 or less, and open one matching listing that seems like a good budget reference so I can see what a lower-cost Toyota option looks like on another marketplace; keep that listing open too so I can compare the two tabs side by side. After that, on CarGurus, pull up the comparison details for the Toyota Camry XLE AWD and the Mazda3 Turbo Hatchback and capture the key specs for each — engine, horsepower, drivetrain, fuel economy, and MSRP — because I want to know whether sticking with Toyota’s AWD choices makes more sense than considering a non-Toyota AWD alternative. In the end, send me a concise summary with the Edmunds RAV4 listing details, the Cars.com budget Toyota listing details, and the side-by-side spec comparison.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully navigated to Edmunds, searched for used Toyota RAV4s near Augusta, GA, and applied filters for AWD and heated seats. The agent then identified and opened the listing for a 2015 Toyota RAV4 Limited (VIN: 2T3DFREV9FW399763). The agent confirmed the presence of AWD and heated seats on the listing page. The agent also sorted by price to ensure it was the lowest-priced qualifying result.

R2: success - The agent successfully navigated to Edmunds, searched for a used Toyota RAV4 near Augusta, GA, and applied filters for AWD and heated seats. It then opened a specific listing (2015 Toyota RAV4 Limited) and extracted the required details: price ($15,069), year (2015), mileage (134,037), and dealer/seller information (Driveway). These details were verified against the listing page in the final summary.

R3: success - The agent successfully navigated to Cars.com, applied the search filters for "Used" Toyota, within 50 miles of Augusta, GA (using zip code 30901), and set a maximum price of $10,000. The agent then opened a specific listing for a 2016 Toyota Camry LE (Step 26). The listing page was confirmed to be open in the final tab list (Step 33, 40). The rubric requirement to find a used Toyota within 50 miles of Augusta, GA, priced at $10,000 or less and open the actual listing page is satisfied.

R4: success - The agent successfully navigated to the CarGurus comparison page for the Toyota Camry XLE AWD and the Mazda3 Turbo Hatchback. It selected the specific trims requested (XLE AWD and 2.5 Turbo Premium Plus Hatchback AWD) and provided a side-by-side comparison table in the final summary that includes all required fields: engine, horsepower, drivetrain, fuel economy, and MSRP. The information provided in the summary is consistent with the requested comparison.

R5: success - The agent successfully performed the required searches and comparisons. It identified a 2015 Toyota RAV4 on Edmunds (AWD/Heated Seats), a 2016 Toyota Camry on Cars.com (budget reference), and provided a side-by-side comparison of the Toyota Camry XLE AWD and Mazda3 Turbo Hatchback using CarGurus data. The final summary includes all three required components with relevant details (price, year, mileage, dealer, and specs).
